subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath illumined the world with the splendours of His Most Great Name, whereupon all things proclaimed that there is none other God but Him, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور العالم بانوار اسمه الاعظم اذ نطق الاشیاء علی انه لا اله الا هو الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
